wikitext: []: Ayanami Raising Project[DS][Japanese] Discussion             Quote Post by Aether » Fri Apr 04, 2014 6:54 pm I've found the game in a... form, and am trying to unlock each of the endings and CG's within it; however, I don't really know how to play it. Does anyone here know how to affect the affection stat, what triggers different endings/scenes/events, and how to unlock Asuka? I've played through twice, and have gotten different(non EoE, I think) endings each time, but haven't really figured out just what the hell it is I'm actually doing. By the way, my DA's folder containing what I've taken thus far of ARIK/ARP is here: [url]http://cppietime.deviantart.com/gallery/48858972[/url] Any discussion, asking of help, image uploading, I could not find any useful information on the already existing thread.

Does anyone here know how to affect the affection stat, what triggers different endings/scenes/events, and how to unlock Asuka? I've played through twice, and have gotten different(non EoE, I think) endings each time, but haven't really figured out just what the hell it is I'm actually doing. By the way, my DA's folder containing what I've taken thus far of ARIK/ARP is here: [url]http://cppietime.deviantart.com/gallery/48858972[/url] Any discussion, asking of help, image uploading, I could not find any useful information on the already existing thread.
